body:
This PR updates the Lobby page CTA buttons to match the visual style of the Login page primary button.

Changes include:
- Unify “Start Solo PvE” and “Start Rogue” button styling
- Replace the old orange Rogue CTA with the shared purple-blue fantasy gradient
- Add decorative divider lines and diamond ornaments inspired by the Login button
- Preserve existing gameplay logic, routing, and responsive layout
- Keep existing hover and interaction behavior lightweight and stable

Verified locally on both desktop and small-screen layouts.

这个 PR 统一了 Lobby 页面 PvE 和 Rogue 按钮的视觉风格，使其与 Login 页面主按钮保持一致。

改动包括：
- 统一 “Start Solo PvE” 和 “Start Rogue” 按钮样式
- 移除 Rogue 原本的橙色按钮，改为统一的紫蓝幻想风格渐变
- 增加 Login 风格的线条与菱形装饰元素
- 不修改任何游戏逻辑、路由或后端内容
- 保持大屏与小屏布局稳定

已在本地桌面端和移动端布局下测试通过。
title: style(lobby): unify PvE and Rogue CTA buttons with login style
